calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-29-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Joseph Demko, Esq. for Plaintiff: Union Bank of California, N.A., a national banking assoc.
Plaintiff's Witness: April Bufka, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: San Raphael Fruits Corporation, fka San Raphael Citrus Corporation as follows:
Principal $4,713,111.59
Prejudgment Interest $221,765.13
Attorney's Fees $18,447.04
Costs $552.98 and Plaintiff is entitled to possession of the personal property listed in Exhibit A, attached to Judgment, see scanned doc. for details.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2005 Continued To Dec-09-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2005 Continued To Oct-28-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
